entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow
entry.content:
Join the SAP ALM Roadshow and learn to shape your ALM Strategy, manage your on-premise and cloud, hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions.

Experience the empowerment through an in-person event. Network with experts to accelerate your implementations and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP’s ALM portfolio. A great opportunity to engage with SAP's ALM experts and product management team.

Registration will be opening soon!

entry.title: Issue – Unable to use alternative SPL GL Indicator type in Down Payment Request
entry.content:
I am trying to use SPL GL Indicator C, but system throwing the error, GL Code not mapped in SPL GL Indicator “F”, We know we can’t make two primary Key Configuration in Sigle place.

 

So please suggest how to another SPL GL Indicator

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue – Unable to use alternative SPL GL Indicator ty...
entry.content:
See kba 3169465 - Special G/L Indicator & not working in Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests App
Which outlines the standard design 

see also best practices in 

Process Navigator - SAP for Me

See also 3452778 - Post from one Down Payment SGI to a different Down Payment SGI

entry.title: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

1) How to post the Journal entry Customer (A) Credit  to customer (B) Debit, - please suggest the app to post the entry

Our client wants to post Customer to Vendor journal entry and Customer to customer journal entry. 

So please suggest how to post these entry in SAP public cloud. 

Upon reviewing the SAP Community, I found that there is no provision for FB01 (Post Document) in the standard SAP configuration

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3428168

2)  SAP system Does not support to Direct down payment (F-48), 

SAP suggest only Downpayment request, however the downpayment request configured only for Spl Ind "F" Our client requirement they want to post Two downpayment for Single Customer, 1st one for Normal Advance another 2nd for Special advance but both are one Reconciliation account, so please suggest how to process this document. 

Thanks

Ragavan

entry.title: Re: 关于中国 balance sheet 和 PL报表的配置问题请教
entry.content: 您是如何管理财务报表的 (Balance sheet & PL)？

entry.title: Re: Completion of third party sales orders
entry.content: Hi, Could you please advise soon? Client needs to complete the orders soon because they need to mark the material as discontinued.

entry.title: Re: Auto generate text for a field
entry.content:
Hi Arun,
Thanks a lot, but need to explore it more because children are not restricted up to 2.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Resource Scheduling with SAP Standard (Out-of-the-Box...
entry.content:
Hi Sarvan Kumar,

To be able to dispatch single operations and suboperations individually and level the work center utilization, you need to enhance the core functions of SAP S/4HANA with the additional license for Resource Scheduling.

See the link below for information on the differences between scheduling with SAP S/4HANA asset management for resource scheduling and without: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e72f747389b340229f7fa343975bfa57/1ffad6fc878e42acb4e2cfd36382b511.html?locale=en-US

Additionally RSH offers the ability to manage work center utilization, use the maintenance scheduling board, manage schedules, plan maintenance work for assets, and much more. See the documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/8308e6d301d54584a33cd04a9861bc52/f2d1705780175c08e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US and a demo video here: https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2023/12/40919e2d-a27e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

I would also note that RSH is not intended to be a successor of CM25, and lastly, CM25 is not supported in the Fiori environment. 

Hope this helps,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: How to configure unauthenticated access to SAP CAP Se...
entry.content: @Hollix Is the authentication required when you access the UI, or when you hit the service endpoint after opening the UI?

entry.title: Re: Costing Release Dump
entry.content: Thanks for reply on my query,

entry.title: Exchange of Story Reports among companies that work with Stories already
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are currently working on implementing Story Reports for our different SuccessFactors modules. So far we have been looking into the different Content Store templates as well as attended training sessions and tried to built stories from scratch.

As part of some SAP meetings we have seen that other companies are already more actively working with Story Reports and have shared some of their examples.

I would like to highlight the idea, if it is worthwhile to share stories that have been build by each of you. Such exchange of ideas and if possible sharing of templates was existing in the past for the 'legacy' reporting.

We found that exchange helpful in the past.

Thanks for your support!

All the best,

Mathias

entry.title: Re: Costing Release Dump
entry.content: Issue has been resolved; I have assigned different Costing sheet to Valuation variant.

entry.title: Re: OBYC and KW
entry.content: Just recheck whether the required tolerance limits are maintained in OMRX and OMR6

entry.title: Re: Top 1 for multiple measure in single widget sac
entry.content:
So without a planning model, yep we're left with using text boxes to give the visual impression of a table.
In this example I only used 3 measures just to see if it works.
This should give you better performance and I'm sure my code/logic can be greatly improved to run more efficiently.

The 'table' on the right is 9 text boxes.   
T1,T2,T3    --  T2 is the product, T3 is the value
T4,T5,T6    --  T5 is the product, T6 is the value
T7,T8,T9    --  T8 is the product, T9 is the value

T1,T4,T7 -- I just hardcoded the text in as the values never change

Table_3.rankBy( {  relatedDimensions:{[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"M1"},rankOrder:RankOrder.Top,value:1});

var sel = Table_3.getSelections()[0];
var result = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultMember("Product",sel).description;
T2.applyText("Product"+"  "+result);
var arr = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();
var value=   ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(  arr[0][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue);
var V2=ConvertUtils.numberToString(value);
	{T3.applyText(V2);}


//----------------------------------------------------------------------------

if(T3.getPlainText().length>0)
	{
		Table_3.rankBy( {  relatedDimensions:{[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"M2"},rankOrder:RankOrder.Top,value:1});
sel = Table_3.getSelections()[0];
result = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultMember("Product",sel).description;

T5.applyText("Product"+"  "+result);
arr = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();
value=   ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(  arr[1][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue);
V2=ConvertUtils.numberToString(value);
	T6.applyText(V2);
	
	}


if(T6.getPlainText().length>0)
	
	{
		Table_3.rankBy( {  relatedDimensions:{[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"M3"},rankOrder:RankOrder.Top,value:1});
sel = Table_3.getSelections()[0];
result = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultMember("Product",sel).description;

T8.applyText("Product"+"  "+result);
arr = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();
value=   ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(  arr[2][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue);
V2=ConvertUtils.numberToString(value);
	T9.applyText(V2);
	
	}
Table_3.removeRanking();

entry.title: Old admin accounts deactivation vs jobs and integrations
entry.content:
Hello, we would like to deactivate some old consultants accounts in our system but we see in the  Scheduled Job Manager and Integration Center that those  accounts  are associated  with  some  jobs ( as Job Owner  or Created by ) or integrations (as last modified). What  would  be the  impact  on the  jobs  and  integrations if we deactivate  those old  accounts? What  should we  have in mind  when doing so?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Cancel picking of EWM Production Material Request
entry.content:
Hi @Enzo_Faggella,

I might be wrong, are you looking to clear PSA ( I think same as you explained )?

  • Clear PSA

    After a PMR is completed, with the status Technically Completed, it is possible that there is still a quantity of the product on the PSA, and no other PMR needs the product. In this case, the product must be brought back to the warehouse so it does not occupy space on the PSA.

    You can display the products on the PSA that are not attached to a PMR with the status Released. You can create warehouse tasks to bring the products back to the warehouse.

    For products staged using the single-order staging method, you must release the reference document to clear the reference in the stock. If you do not release the reference document, the stock can never be used for another PMR.

    Source/details: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/019deb535cbb5d1ee10000000a441470.html

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: How to send Email
entry.content: Hi Sinha , Can u please help with 1 complete sample.

entry.title: Re: Position value not reflecting on job requisition
entry.content:
Hi Nimesha,

As long as you use the standard field ID for the position number, the system will automatically map it. If you are using the position object, you need to provide the relevant read/write RBP permissions for the position object. However, if you use the standard free-text position field, RBP is not required.

Can you please share the XML definition of the field ID you are using for the position number in your XML?

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Pricing in delivery note - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
We are now in a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition project.

In the output form of the delivery note (generated from a sales order), there is no reference to the price—neither for the products nor for the general pricing conditions. The customer needs this delivery note to be valued, including all prices, before sending it to their client. I have seen that at some point there was an option to add a proforma invoice (F8) to the delivery note, but we do not want it to be at the billing level.

What solution can we provide?

Thanks,

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionSAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Drop shipment and returns scenario for Trans...
entry.content: H Ajit, I am creating the flows in Sandbox. For FU I have copied standard 0001 to create 01FU. For FO I have copied 1000 for FO01. Now the flow between 01FU and FO01 is going fine and I have been able to do an end to end process in SAP TM S4 HANA. Now I have created type 5000 FO separately. I am trying to add this 01FU in this FO and it is not happening. Sorry tried to add screenshot but it is not working.

entry.title: Re: Improving SAP Integration Suite with a sorting mechanism for DataStore entries
entry.content:
@Florian_Kube The event mesh capability is a metered/charged feature. The exact details can be found here: https://me.sap.com/notes/2942344, but in essence it states that 'outbound events' are measured as 1 transaction (chargeable message) per 100 events. So this would mean that 'consuming an event from the queue 100 times' would translate to 1 chargeable message (in addition to the 1 message consumed by the iflow itself). The exact implications of that would of course depend on your iflow design.

Regarding the use of APIs, there is no cost associated to calling APIs described on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Slicer Buttons like Feature like PowerBi in SAP Cloud Analytics
entry.content:
Hii community.

i am creating a story where i want to add the button slicer type feature just like in the given image where if i click on running or closed the cards above it increases or decreases in numbers showing more names . Please tell me any work arounds for this. The given image is from PowerBi

entry.title: Is there any way to change the VBRK-VBELN field for an ID that is not being used yet?
entry.content:
As a result of a problem in the configuration of the ranges, the invoice was created with id 249200142R, when in reality it should have been id 259200000R, which has not been used before in the system. Is there any way we can make this change? In other words: Is there any way to change the VRBK-VBELN field for an identification that is not being used and that is prior to the corresponding one that would correspond to this period of the year? If this is not possible, what other solution could be proposed to the client? Any help will be greatly appreciated

Thank you very much in advance. Kind regards

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
Hi @Pyae_Phyo_Thwe ,

I have tested in my test environment and it is working fine reading and writing the global variable inside the splitter:

Regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Re: We need the provision for FB01 & F-48
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

To answer your first question, I suggest you to use the Post General Journal Entries application with the right journal entry type :

Once you have decided which G/L account to use for posting, make sure it allows the right account type authorized in the document type configuration (SSCUI 101522 - Define Document Types) :

Regarding your second question, you can use the Manage Customer Down Payment Requests app to create the document and then use either the Manage Automatic Payments app or the Post Incoming Payments app to make sure "transforming" your customer down payment request into a customer down payment.

I hope this will help you solve your problems.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Error "The statement ENDCLASS is unexpected"
entry.content: put a period on line 19

entry.title: Show the ID of measures even though it has a description in the builder menue
entry.content:
I have multiple calculations in my story in SAC, each with its own ID. To make the report more readable, I wanted to add descriptions to certain calculations so that viewers can more easily identify the measures. However, I'm accustomed to using the ID names of the calculations. When I add a description, only the description is displayed in the builder menu. Unfortunately, this creates issues, as I cannot find certain calculations anymore since I only remember their ID names.

Is there a way to display the IDs of calculations and measures in the builder menu while still assigning descriptions to certain measures?

To make my issue clearer, here is an example:

I have two measures, and I want a different name to be displayed in the charts. To achieve this, I changed the description of the measures. However, when I update the description, the name in the builder menu also changes, which is problematic.

I hope someone knows a solution to this issue. Otherwise, I even might end up with measures that have the same name

Kind regards
Stefan

entry.title: Registration Connector - migrating registrations of PENDING status
entry.content: I would like to get clarification and understand the behaviour of the LMS system when I run the Registration connector. The client that we are working for are looking to migrate Class data for Classes scheduled to take place in 2nd half of 2025. They have asked me to migrate these Classes into the system and then they want the Class Registrations (i.e Registrations Connector) to be migrated aswell. I have demonstrated to them how the Class connector and Registration connector work. They have raised a question about Registrations that relate to Waitlist statuses. When learners whose Registration status are currently in Waitlist status in their existing LMS, are migrated; what will happen when i migrate these Registrations? How does this impact notifications etc

entry.title: Treffen Sie die Experten des SAP Kundensupports auf den DSAG-Technologietagen 2025 in Wiesbaden
entry.content:
Treffen Sie die Experten des SAP Kundensupports auf den DSAG-Technologietagen 2025 in Wiesbaden

Vom 2. bis 3. April 2025 ist es wieder soweit – die DSAG-Technologietage öffnen ihre Türen in Wiesbaden, und der SAP-Kundensupport ist vor Ort mit spannenden Inhalten und innovativen Ansätzen vertreten! Besuchen Sie den SAP-Stand und lernen Sie die Experten des SAP Kundensupports persönlich kennen.

Was erwartet Sie am SAP-Stand?

Unsere Experten decken eine Vielzahl an Themen ab, die für die Transformation und den Betrieb Ihrer SAP-Lösungen relevant sind:

  • Integrated Toolchain – Umstellung auf die Cloud oder auf eine Clean Core Strategie mit Hilfe von SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Signavio, LeanIX
  • SAP Cloud ALM – Optimieren Sie Ihre Cloud-Reise mit proaktiver Überwachung und Prozessunterstützung
  • SAP Business Transformation Center & Transformation Tools – Tools zur nahtlosen Datenmigration und Systemtransformation
  • AI & Agentic AI im Kundensupport – KI-getriebene Innovationen, die Support-Prozesse revolutionieren
  • SAP for Me & Early Watch Services – Optimieren Sie Ihren Systembetrieb und bleiben Sie proaktiv informiert
  • Black Friday Cyber Monday / Holiday Season Readiness Program – Innovative Tools wie Smart Resolve und Cure 360 zur Vorbereitung auf die umsatzstärksten Verkaufsevents des Jahres

Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, um mit den SAP-Experten ins Gespräch zu kommen, und erfahren Sie, wie der SAP-Kundensupport als Frontrunner im Einsatz von Künstlicher Intelligenz (KI), Agentic AI und LLMs (Large Language Models) vorangeht. Erhalten Sie Einblicke in den praktischen Einsatz dieser Technologien und nehmen Sie wertvolle Ansätze für Ihr Unternehmen mit.

Verpassen Sie nicht diese spannenden Sessions!

In Ihrem Messefahrplan sollten diese beiden Sessions auf keinen Fall fehlen:

Session 1: SAP TED Talk
🗓2. April, 17:15–18:00 Uhr Sichern Sie Ihre Reise in die Cloud mit SAP Cloud ALM
Planen Sie den Umstieg auf die Cloud? SAP Cloud ALM bietet Ihnen eine klare Roadmap und umfassende Unterstützung für Ihre Cloud-Reise. Diese Lösung minimiert Risiken und stellt einen nahtlosen Betriebsablauf sicher. Entdecken Sie durch praxisnahe Demonstrationen die neuesten Funktionen und erhalten Sie entscheidende Einblicke, um Ihre Cloud-Strategie effektiv zu optimieren. Mit SAP Cloud ALM erhalten Sie nicht nur technische Unterstützung, sondern auch klare Anleitungen für das Projektmanagement, um Ihren Unternehmenserfolg in der digitalen Transformation zu sichern.

Sprecher: Sören Ruder, SVP, Chief Product Officer (CPO) and Head of Customer Experience & Solutions (CXS)

Session 2: SAP Expert Session (freie Q&A)
🗓3. April, 10:55–11:15 Uhr Autonomes Application Lifecycle Management
Die Rolle der Künstlichen Intelligenz (KI), insbesondere der Agentischen KI, beim Transformieren des Application Lifecycle Managements (ALM) steht im Zentrum dieser Präsentation. Erfahren Sie, wie KI-Technologien nicht nur Aufgaben automatisieren, sondern auch proaktiv Entscheidungen treffen, um die Effizienz und Leistungsfähigkeit Ihrer IT-Systeme zu steigern. Erleben Sie, wie autonomes ALM herkömmliche Verwaltungsansätze revolutioniert und den Weg für innovative, zukunftsweisende Prozessgestaltung ebnet.

Sprecher: Sören Ruder, SVP, Chief Product Officer (CPO) and Head of Customer Experience & Solutions (CXS)

Beachten Sie bitte auch folgende Sessions:

2. April 2025

  • 13:00 Uhr - V005: SAP ALM Überblick und Ausblick
  • 13:00 Uhr - V021: SAP EarlyWatch Alert: kritische Alerts Ihrer hybriden SAP-Landschaft zentral zusammengefasst - auch nach dem Wartungsende des SAP Solution Managers
  • 14:15 Uhr - V006: SAP Cloud ALM im Betrieb
  • 14:15 Uhr - V022: KI Szenarien im SAP Services & Support / Mit der AI Innovation Plattform den Business Value von SAP Services & Support steigern
  • 16:00 - V007: SAP Cloud ALM für Implementierung
  • 17:15 - V023: SAP Maintenance Strategy - End of Mainstream Maintenance SAP Solution Manager 7.2. - what you need to know now

3. April 2025

  • 10:30 Uhr - V057: Transition nach SAP Cloud ALM
  • 14:00 Uhr - V059: SAP Cloud ALM - Change & Deployment Management
  • 15:15 Uhr - V060: SAP Cloud ALM im Kontext Rise und AI 

Treffen Sie uns auch in den DSAG-Arbeitskreisen

Unsere Experten sind darüber hinaus in den DSAG-Arbeitskreisen aktiv. Ein Blick in die Agenda lohnt sich – vielleicht sehen wir uns dort!

Wir freuen uns auf den persönlichen Austausch mit Ihnen in Wiesbaden. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam über Ihre individuellen Herausforderungen sprechen und wie wir Sie mit modernen Tools, KI-Innovationen und bewährten Services auf Ihrer Reise zur Cloud und darüber hinaus begleiten können.

Mehr Informationen und die vollständige Agenda finden Sie auf der offiziellen Website der DSAG-Technologietage.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions

entry.title: Re: Position value not reflecting on job requisition
entry.content: @Sanjeet2 : PFA the pos definition.The role-Recruiter has the object permissions in miscellaneous permissions.Not sure what else is missing.

entry.title: SAP S4HANA with PSI MES subcontracting process
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a system in which we have a non-SAP MES system.

All production execution is happening in MES while SAP is acting as a slave systems, i,e. for getting the cost etc.

How can we achieve the subcontracting process as in here, we need to send the material to Subcontractor, once limitation we have seen is that SAP production order is only created once specific operation in MES is completed, do we need to create a specific storage location for each subcontractor to capture the cost or we can create a production order with subcon operation once production activity is completed?

entry.title: Re: Position value not reflecting on job requisition
entry.content: <field-definition id="std_position_obj" type="object" required="true" custom="false" object-type="Position"> <field-label><![CDATA[Position]]></field-label> <field-label lang="en_GB"><![CDATA[Position]]></field-label> <field-label lang="en_US"><![CDATA[Position]]></field-label> <field-label lang="es_MX"><![CDATA[Puesto]]></field-label> <field-label lang="fr_CA"><![CDATA[Poste]]></field-label> <field-description><![CDATA[Provide Position Number]]></field-description> </field-definition>

entry.title: Re: Auto generate text for a field
entry.content:
Hi @RishabhGupta198 

We shall consider 2 scenarios,

Scenario 1:- In relationship type for child if you defined/created as Child 1, Child 2, Child 3, Child 4, etc then based on the selected child relationship type, in the business rule you shall able to suffix the alphabet A,B,C,D etc. 

 

Scenario 2:- In the business rule, create rule to "Get Count of Dependents()" function specifically for relationship type "Child" and based on the count of dependent child define the rule. 

example:- 1. Get Count of Dependents() = 1 for relationship type "Child" the set name as concatenate "parent name" + "A" 

2. Get Count of Dependents() > 1 for relationship type "Child" the set name as concatenate "parent name" + "B" 

3. Get Count of Dependents() > 2 for relationship type "Child" the set name as concatenate "parent name" + "C" 

4. Get Count of Dependents() > 3 for relationship type "Child" the set name as concatenate "parent name" + "D" and so on..,

Can you try this based on your personrelationship definition?

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy 

Thanks for the nice and descriptive blog post. I followed that and able to configure the joule with minimum efforts.

Only one question why we exposed the SAP Fiori business role to BTP build work zone. will the joule have enabled on s4hana public cloud or SAP build work zone?.

For me its enabled on S4hana Public cloud itself. I m a bit confused with usage of build work zone.

 

Regards

Shadan

entry.title: I have to trigger idoc for PR create whenever a PR is created using MD03 i need BADI or Enh point
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have to trigger IDOC for PR creation using TCODE MD03 i need to know a BADI or enhancement where i can read the code to trigger i used ME_REQ_POSTED but it works only for ME52n.I need access to both Item and header data to papulate the IDOC.

Thanks

entry.title: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a simple report in which I'm using CL_GUI_ALV_GRID. I want to add a new line with ALV. When inserted new line and the user types in a MATNR and press Enter-Key, some other fields like MAKTX and others should be filled. I have method "handle_data_changed" which is triggered when Enter-Key is pressed. In this method i will add the new line to the internal table. 

But till now, I found no solution to refresh the alv grid so that I can see what is added from the method. I tried the refresh_table_method at the end of the method "handle_data_changed" but I can't see the changes in the ALV grid.

Any idea on how can I update the content of the added row?

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Using Job Scheduler in SAP BTP [7]: Multitenancy (0): Intro
entry.content: Hi @z54, in our case we were facing the issue because we had two instances of the Job Scheduler Service in our provider sub-account. Once we deleted one, the issue was solved. Take a look if it is your case as well!

entry.title: Crystal Reports (SP37 Windows 11) Orientation Setting not working
entry.content:
Hi,

A customer of us has problems printing Labels in the Orientation he wants.

He uses a helper Program to read out the Report Orientation to use as Printer Setting. The Report has the Orientation set to Landscape, but the read out Value is Portrait.

Report Page Setting:

The C# Source used to read the Value is:

report = new ReportDocument();
report.Load(reportPath);
var reportOrientation = report.PrintOptions.PaperOrientation;
// Alternate way to get the orientation
var reportCOrientation = report.ReportClientDocument.ReportDocument.PrintOptions.PaperOrientation;

Both ways return Portrait instead of Landscape. Does anyone know of another way to read the real Page Setting set in the Report for the Orientation?

entry.title: Re: Problem Statement: Unable to Deploy CAPM Project on C...
entry.content: Thank you for your suggestion! I have checked my xs-security.json and mta.yaml files and ensured that the xsappname is the same in both. The TESTAPP-auth service was successfully generated. However, I am still facing the following error during deployment: Error uploading content module "TESTAPP-app-deployer" in service "TESTAPP-html5-repo-host": Operation 'Upload File' to the URL 'https://html5-apps-repo-dt.cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/v2/files/upload' failed. Remote server responded with HTTP status code 500, error message: 'Upload application content failed { CODE: '1001' } validation error: Could not find applications in the request.', error type 'Bad Request'

entry.title: Splitting criteria change
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

The following splitting criterias are used by the standard SAP to split invoices:

  •  Payer

  • Payment terms

  • Destination country

  • Actual GI date

  • Incoterms

  • Billing date and billing due date

  • Billing doc type

  • Foreign data trade 

  • Sold to party

  • Company Code

We have a business requirement to change the foreign data trade criteria to ship to party? Is it possible to do that? What are the impacts in changing this criteria?

Our client wants the splitting of invoices to be done based on the ship to party not on the final recipient .

Could you please help me on that?

Regards,

Liza

@Lakshmipathi

entry.title: Re: Fiori App Extension Deployment from SAP BAS to S4HANA...
entry.content:
why you expect that?

that's complete wrong expectation

entry.title: Identity Federation: IAS in Proxy Mode - Substitution of Subject Name Identifier
entry.content:
Identity Federation:  IAS in Proxy Mode - Substitution of Subject Name Identifier  

 Context

Existing IAS customers may be sending a SubjectNameIdentifier as part of SAML response (say EmailID for FieldGlass) from their idP and to onboard another SAP Cloud Application (say Ariba,  may need EmployeeID ) a different SubjectNameIdentifier is needed.

We have a customer who informed that from there from their landscape another IdP instance cannot be created as it is not allowing multiple IdPs against a single SAP CIS tenant  (   https://<SAP IAS tenant  id>-accounts.ondemand.com/admin ) ot suite-integrated) 

Solution:

Step 1:
Identify the attribute that will serve as the NameID for the second SAP Cloud Application (SP). Ensure this attribute is included in the Corporate IdP’s SAML response within the additional attributes section.

Step 2:
Configure the corresponding IAS application for the second SP so that it substitutes the SubjectNameIdentifier with the chosen additional attribute.

 

Here “IdP Proxy” is the IAS Application which is substituting the NameId

 

Configurations: 

Prerequisites:

Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

Identity Federation: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

 

  • Use Identity Authentication user store” = ON  Although User Data is not picked up from CIS User Storethis is needed 

(Path : Home > Corporate Identity Providers> select the IDP> Identity Federation >  Enable “Use Identity Authentication user store” )

 

  • Subject Name Identifier > Primary Attribute

Option 1: Standard Attribute
Source = Corporate Identity Provider
Value = lastName

Option 2: Custom Attribute
Source = expression
Value = ${corporateIdP.attributeName}

  ( Path : Home> Application & Resources > Application >    (Select the Application > Subject Name Identifier)

 

 

SAML Responses will be as below:

Corporate IdP to SAP CIS (IAS)

 

CIS to SP ( Ariba)

entry.title: DEMOs: App Review Order Progress - Multilevel View
entry.content:
Exciting news coming to you in the area of manufacturing with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 Release. The new app Review Order Progress - Multilevel View (F7681) is finally here. If you want to read further details continue here: New Review Order Progress - Multilevel View App

Below you can watch all relevant demos: 

 

Demo: Teaser Review Order Progress - Multilevel View

 

Demo: Teaser Review Order Progress - Multilevel View

 

Demo: Review Order Progress - Overview 

 

Demo: Review Order Progress - Overview

 

Demo: Solving Issues Using the Review Order Progress App

 

Demo: Solving Issues Using the Review Order Progress App

 

Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content: Did you execute method check_changed_data ?

entry.title: Re: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and...
entry.content: Please, about tax reformr I have a problem during applied 3556404 because the condition type w dont exist. (sapappl 617). The note 2056663 - Introduction of "W" calculation rule (percentage with 6 decimal places) create this type but need the package VF_PRC_QTYCNVFACT. This is the problem the package is crated by notes ca-gtf-cte but this notes have a note 1915492 in your pre-requisites. I can't download it and the portal says it doesn't exist. Anyone else having this problem? Thanks Eduardo

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content:
The line was inserted by the user, hence you must not insert the line yourself, instead call the method CHECK_DATA_CHANGED which transfers any data changed by the user into the ALV internal table.

The refresh is to be done by filling via the method MODIFY_CELL of the parameter ER_DATA_CHANGED of the DATA_CHANGED event. You don't need to call REFRESH_TABLE_DISPLAY.

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SA...
entry.content: Dear Vera Jiang, Thank you for your prompt and valuable response. Apologies for not mentioning earlier, but we have recently migrated our systems from Oracle Database to HANA Database and have moved to a private cloud environment. If any of the following three attributes—SID, Installation Number (10-digit), and System Number (18-digit)—are changed and differ from the previous system, a duplicated system with an extended SID may be generated. As KBA 1727294 will only be applicable when the recommended value of 1 is used, and all three attributes (SID, Installation Number, and System Number) remain the same as in the previous system. Kind regards, Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content:
thanks for the suggestion @WRoeckelein. I'll give it a try, but based on the documentation, I'm not sure if it supports what we or at least I try to do. In my use cases I need to either execute an EML statement of a different RAP BO (which will trigger a commit) or call FM's or other logic that require a COMMIT statement before we can continue. In these cases I need to make sure that I also know the result before I can continue, and not just have the commit or rollback to happen together with my RAP object's runtime.

For example, in my last use case, I needed to convert planned orders to production orders and then update the production order header . I obviously can't execute the EML statement to update the header of the production before the production order is created as I don't know the production order id, and I will also not execute that part if the production order was not created. But I don't see how I can do the same by using bgPF?

entry.title: Re: Error in RFC communication while archiving a document
entry.content: I am getting the same error, please let me know if it is resolved.

entry.title: The Data Revolution: Bridging The Gap Between Technology And Business
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced business world, data is the lifeblood of organizations. However, many companies struggle with a significant challenge: a "data divide" between technology experts and business decision-makers.

This gap leads to delays in responding to critical signals and hinders agile decision-making. Addressing this divide is crucial for a seamless flow of insights from data to decisions.

 

The Data Divide: A Growing Challenge

The disconnect between those who manage data and those who use it for business decisions is becoming increasingly apparent. Technology experts often focus on databases, algorithms, and data structures, while decision-makers prioritize KPIs, market trends, and strategic objectives.

This communication gap can result in missed opportunities and inefficient use of valuable data resources.

 

AI: The Game-Changer

Business users need data insights delivered in real-time and within the appropriate business context. This requires a holistic integration between data platforms and business applications, with data products based on harmonized business data models. Connecting insights directly to business decisions is a critical factor, especially in the age of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

AI is revolutionizing how organizations handle and utilize data. Moving forward, every organization will essentially become a data manufacturer for AI, and business context will be a non-negotiable ingredient for production-ready AI solutions. By unifying data platforms and business applications, companies can establish the foundation for Business AI to flourish.

Unifying Applications, Data, and AI

To truly leverage the potential of data and AI, organizations need a comprehensive strategy that brings together applications, data, and AI in a cohesive ecosystem. This approach should include:

  • Unparalleled Applications: Comprehensive, modular, and extensible business applications that cover every aspect of operations.
  • Unmatched Data: A centralized data cloud that turns valuable business data from every part of the organization into a semantically rich treasure trove.
  • Unrivaled AI: Collaborative AI agents that enhance operations, drive real-time insights, and optimize decision-making at scale.

The Future of Enterprise Data Management

Several key trends will shape the landscape of enterprise data management:

  • Business Data Fabric: Organizations will increasingly adopt a business data fabric approach, providing a unified and scalable data platform that seamlessly connects data from various sources, including SAP and non-SAP applications, on-premises systems, and cloud-native solutions.
  • Insight Apps: Pre-built, AI-infused insight applications will become commonplace, offering out-of-the-box analytical models, dashboards, and workflows for industry- and function-specific use cases. These apps will help organizations make timely decisions and respond to critical business signals in real-time.
  • Data Products: Companies will leverage pre-built data products that provide a 360-degree view of critical business processes across all applications. These products will ensure consistency and maintain business context, making data instantly connected, actionable, and contextual.
  • AI Copilots: AI-powered copilots will augment decision-making processes, automating complex business tasks and providing intelligent recommendations based on comprehensive data analysis.
  • Governance and Compliance: As data becomes increasingly critical to business operations, robust governance and compliance frameworks will be essential to ensure data quality, security, and regulatory adherence.

Embracing the Data-Driven Future

The future of business lies in the ability to harness data effectively, bridging the gap between technology and business users. By adopting a comprehensive approach that unifies applications, data, and AI, organizations can unlock transformative insights, connect all their data sources, and foster reliable AI-driven decision-making. The most successful organizations will embrace this data revolution, creating a seamless flow from data to decisions and leveraging advanced technologies like business data fabrics, insight apps, and AI copilots to gain a competitive edge.

The time to act is now; invest in building a strong data foundation that meets today's needs and prepares you for the AI-driven future, turning the data divide into a data dividend, driving innovation, efficiency, and growth across all aspects of business.

Discover how SAP Business Suite can help your business be more resilient to business challenges and responsive to opportunities.

Follow me on LinkedIn.

entry.title: How to Approve/Reject Workflow from Outlook Mail - SAP S/4 Hana Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 
Good day!

We have created Purchase Order and Purchase Requisition workflow from Manage Workflow app.
Our requirement is -
How End user can approve / reject Workflow via outlook mail?
Please note we are using SAP S/4 Hana Private cloud version.

Thanks in Advance, 
Ankit.

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: PPDS Shift Definitions vs Shift definition maintained at S4(External Capacity)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S4 with embedded PPDS, I see two ways to manage Shift definitions:

  1. Define the Shifts in S4 and transfer the Resources to PPDS, allowing them to reference the external capacity maintained in S4.

  2. Modify the transfer settings in CFC9 by unchecking "external capacity," then transfer the Resources to PPDS and maintain the Shift definitions directly in S4-PPDS.

Additionally, I would like to understand if there is any impact when using shift definitions maintained in the PPDS system from a Fiori perspective. Do Fiori apps read and recognize the shift definitions & Downtimes stored in PPDS?

Thanks

Debasis Nanda

entry.title: Re: Could Race Conditions Occur in This SAP CAP Scenario?
entry.content:
@Willem_Pardaens

Hi, are you okay ?

The test is that two users are making two different posts at the same time, but in different entities.

However, the entity of the first user is picking up the email of the second user because they are running simultaneously.

entry.title: Re: Auto generate text for a field
entry.content: Hi Arun, Thanks. Challenge here is that parent Object is a field, defined within custom MDF object, rather than defining parent and child relationship. In child object, we have to mention parent object in one of the field as input. It is difficult to use given functions of business rule.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern, 29. April 2025
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community der Zentralschweiz

Bald ist es wieder Zeit für einen gemeinsamen Event. Wir freuen uns, den nächsten SAP Stammtisch (PLUS) Event in Luzern ankündigen zu dürfen. Seid am 29. April dabei, wir halten wieder spannende Themen für euch bereit:

  • UNIT Test your Business Objects in RAP)
  • SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Entwicklung einer Side-by-Side Extension

Registriert euch bitte direkt hier oder unter nachfolgendem Link:

Anmeldung SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern

Bis bald, wir freuen uns auf euch!

Eure SAP Community Luzern (Zentralschweiz)

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow
entry.content:
Join the SAP ALM Roadshow and learn to shape your ALM Strategy, manage your on-premise and cloud, hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions.

Experience the empowerment through an in-person event. Network with experts to accelerate your implementations and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP’s ALM portfolio. A great opportunity to engage with SAP's ALM experts and product management team.

Registration will be opening soon!

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: Hello Olga, Thank you for info and I again tried the solution you gave. To be clear and if I am understanding correctly your suggestion. While building query I left user information as dimension. I set weight as Measure. I also set Objective Id as Dimension. Then went to designer mode, added table widget. added user information as dimension. selected cross tab and added weight(measure) as column dimension and this worked. Now added calculation and selected type Aggregation, gave a name for calculation. Under properties selected count dimension and selected aggregation dimension as Objective ID.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Manage Automatic Payment for Payment M...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

The "H" payment method has a specific configuration that requires the creation of the variants mentioned in the error message you got.

To solve your problem, you have to create those variants using the Post Bills of Exchange Presentation Document app and filling the fields accordingly to your needs :

Once you have created all the variants, launch your automatic payment again and see if the payment runs afterwards.

I hope this will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business par...
entry.content:
Hej Ajit,

many many thanks for your reply and answer. I do have more question, because I did not understand everything. 

Is it correct, that I have two Directories in which I need to customize SAP? First is "Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner" and Second is "Yard Logistics" folder.

Let's start with Cross-Application Components:
There I need to define: 1. BP Role (ZYL_DR)  & 2. BP Role Type (ZYL_DR) and 3. Number Range. There are 4 Number Ranges Nos defined. How do I know which number range is used by my BP Role? Do i need to define the number range here as "External"? Do I need to put the "D" in front of the number here? In this case: Do I need to define a new number range? 

Than go to the Yard Logistics Folder:

Here I define the number range for the driver, which looks like this: 

Do I need to define this number as external? And do i need to add the "D" here?

 

Many thanks and have a good start to the new week 🙂

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Splitting criteria change
entry.content: Create a custom routine in VOFM, insert the required logic, assign this routine to the field Data VBRK/VBRP in copy control.  Consider also RV60AFZA

entry.title: Extending view S1 on fiori app breaks model in extension project
entry.content:
Hello i am trying to extend the S1(main view) in fiori application F0843 using extension project.

But every time i try to implement it (using "copy of the original view") the app breaks even before i change anything.

After some debuging i found that the oModel "oFrontend" and others are not present after the replacement.

Before S1 replacement

After:

After S1 replacement

Manifest:


Please help me,

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content: @toonvl ok, if you need the result, there is IMHO no possibility. But are you sure a EML statement of a different entity will trigger a COMMIT? IMHO this will just part of the current RAP transaction and will be committed/rollbacked according to the current transactions result. But you could IMHO update the PO header in a bgPF task which will be executed depending if a COMMIT/ROLLBACK will happen. The only problem still remaining is the forwarding of the order id, but you could use a database table with mapping of planned order  id to PO order id and create the entry after BAPI call for PO creation so can read it in the the bgPF (and the bgPF has the planned order id as a parameter). COXT_BAPI_ORDER_CREATE has iv_commit parameter.

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: Hello Olga, Thank you for info and I again tried the solution you gave. To be clear and if I am understanding correctly your suggestion. While building query I left user information as dimension. I set weight as Measure. I also set Objective Id as Dimension. Then went to designer mode, added table widget. added user information as dimension. selected cross tab and added weight(measure) as column dimension and this worked. Now added calculation and selected type Aggregation, gave a name for calculation. Under properties selected count dimension and selected aggregation dimension as Objective ID. With this new issue is anyone with null or no objective is showing s 1. I want it to show as 0. As this is NOT the solution I tried another option to convert objective Id as measure instead of dimension. I then went to table widget then add calculation. again use Agrregation, Count excl null measure objective ID. now it asks aggregation dimension here. I don't get obejctive ID as its measure if I select user Id or Business Unit the count is as 1 even for employees with 5 objectives. Also please stop asuming that i didn't go through training. i did go through story reporting administration training and job aids multiple times. the issue with training is they just teach simple things like 2+2 =4 but don't teach If (A+B/C*D) greater than equal to1 then count or sum etc.. or to get % of employees in business unit with atleast 1 objective kind of scenario.

entry.title: Re: OBYC and KW
entry.content: Thank you for the advice I have double checked and both have been maintained. The actual tolerance works correctly - the issue is how it is deriving which gl code to post to.

entry.title: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

I'm trying to hide a parameter based on the tcode the program is used in. The selection screen has several tabs with input parameters. When I tried the following code on the first tab, everything worked fine: Neither the input or the selection text of the parameter is shown.
However, on the next tab, for some reason it does hide the input fields, but it still shows the selection texts. 
With the shown code, the first case is what does work correctly. The second case (with screen2) doesnt work. I first tried only using the 'active' part and setting it to 0, which is how I had it in the first place for the parameters that do correctly get hidden. Then I tried setting 'screen-invisible' to 1, and to 0, and putting either 'invisible' first or 'active' first, but nothing works. 

Does anyone have any idea what might be going wrong here?

Thank you so much in advance!

 

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
   IF sy-tcode = 'TCODE'. 
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen).
      CASE ls_screen-name.
        WHEN 'P_NAME'. 
        ls_screen-active = '0'. 
        MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
    ELSEIF sy-tcode <> 'TCODE'. 
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen2).
      CASE ls_screen2-name.
        WHEN 'P_NAME'. 
        ls_screen2-invisible = '1'.
        ls_screen2-active = '0'. 
        MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen2.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content: I just realized I should have changed the parameter names, so for clarity, the two parameters are supposed to be two totally different parameters.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content: Hi @Irk  we haven't identified any problems. If you're still experiencing this issue, can you please share more information (have you tried incognito, what landscape, trial or not, etc)?

entry.title: Re: how to create in SAP C4C a report that measures the d...
entry.content: 3) (ValidityToDate GT Tomorrow) * Period to current and aggregated total on SalesPhase, 4) (ValidityToDate LT Tomorrow) * Period days and aggregated total on SalesPhase
